name: samesake-workspace

scripts.test: bun test packages/sdk packages/server packages/providers packages/enrich packages/embed packages/presets
scripts.lint: oxlint packages/sdk/src packages/server/src packages/providers/src packages/enrich/src packages/embed/src packages/presets/src packages/cli/src packages/mcp/src
scripts.build: for d in packages/sdk packages/enrich packages/server packages/providers packages/embed packages/presets packages/cli packages/mcp; do (cd "$d" && bun run build) || exit 1; done
scripts.release:publish: bun run build && for dir in packages/*; do [ -f "$dir/package.json" ] && (cd "$dir" && bun publish || true); done && changeset tag

//overrides: Porulle 0.1.0 adapters publish '@porulle/core: workspace:*' (alpha publish bug); pin it so consumers can resolve it. Fixed upstream in 0.8.0 (adapters now publish real semver) — drop this override when apps/playground upgrades off @porulle/*@0.1.0.
